productDisplayName: Nike Men Free Trainer Grey Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteUltra light, durable and flexible, the nike Free Trainer 5.0 is constructed with a seamless upper fixated with light-weight layers of Hyperfuse material. The nike Free Trainer 5.0 delivers a flexible, sock-like Fit, excellent support and multi-surface traction that stands up to abuse during field drills, running or lifting.Product DetailsFeatures a no-sew construction, inner mesh, a dynamic fit system and dual pull lacing systemMildly padded tongue and inner Full length Phylon midsole and full inner sleeve made of lightweight meshDiamondFLX traction, solid rubber pods in the heel and perimeter of the forefoot, delta-node pattern and nike free technology in the medial midfoot for barefoot feel and natural fitMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
